name: Good Pie
teaser: Pretty much the only pizza I'll eat in Las Vegas, but I'd eat it no matter where I was. Grandma slices are the star.
review: Pretty much the only pizza I'll eat in Las Vegas, but I'd eat it no matter where I was. Grandma slices are the star for a reason, but Vincent Rotolo and his team do everything well and provide exceptional service.
headsUp: Las Vegas has no shortage of celebrity restaurants. This is better than most.
update: Still the best Neapolitan in Las Vegas.
address: 1212 S Main St, Las Vegas, NV 89104, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Sunday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM
